SAKURA_MOD_POWER_REFLECTION_POWER.title: Reflection
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_REFLECTION_POWER.descri: For each stack, the next time an enemy attack hits you, reflect all of that attack's damage and remove 1 stack.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_REFLECTION_POWER.smartD: Each stack reflects one enemy attack.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LUCID_GUARD_POWER.title: Lucid Guard
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LUCID_GUARD_POWER.descr: The next attack damage you take this turn is capped.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LUCID_PIERCE_POWER.desc: Your next Attack this turn ignores enemy Block.
Each stack increases attack damage this enemy takes by 10%. Every 6 stacks convert into 1 [gold]Freeze[/gold]. Frostbite loses 1 stack at the end of the enemy's turn.
Each stack increases attack damage taken by 10%. Every 6 stacks convert into 1 [gold]Freeze[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_SAKURA_TEMPORARY_DEXTER: Block gained from cards is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_SAKURA_COST_REDUCTION_P: A tracked card costs 1 less this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_RECORD_POWER.title: Record
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_RECORD_POWER.descriptio: HP and Block are recorded. The next Record sets your HP and Block to the recorded values.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_RECORD_POWER.smartDescr: Recorded HP {RecordedHp:diff()} and Block {RecordedBlock:diff()}. The next Record replays them and removes this.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_REPAIR_REGENERATION_POW: Your [gold]Regeneration[/gold] no longer decreases at end of turn.
Before drawing at the start of your next turn, if you did not lose HP in the meantime, draw {Amount} additional cards and gain {Amount} [gold]Energy[/gold].
Next turn: if HP was not lost, draw {Amount} additional cards and gain {Amount} Energy.
At the start of your next turn, add queued Spiral copies to your hand. They gain [red]Forgotten[/red].
Next turn: add {Amount} Forgotten Spiral copy/copies to your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_DREAMING_POWER.title: Dreaming
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_DREAMING_POWER.descript: Before drawing at the start of each turn, look at the top 5 cards of your draw pile. Choose 1 and put it on top; it costs 0 this turn and gains [red]Forgotten[/red].
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_DREAMING_POWER.smartDes: Before start-of-turn draw: choose a card from the top 5, put it on top, and give it Forgotten and a cost of 0 this turn.
This turn, played cards that would enter your discard pile return to your hand instead. Each time a card returns this way, it costs 1 more this turn.
Discard becomes hand; returned cards cost 1 more each time.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_KINDNESS_POWER.title: Kindness
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_KINDNESS_POWER.descript: This combat, the next card that would be [gold]Exhausted[/gold] after being played is returned to your hand instead.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_KINDNESS_POWER.smartDes: Next Exhausted card returns to hand.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_MIRAGE_POWER.title: Mirage
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_MIRAGE_POWER.descriptio: This enemy deals 0 attack damage until the end of its turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_MIRAGE_POWER.smartDescr: This enemy's attack damage is 0 until the end of its turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LABYRINTH_POWER.title: Labyrinth
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LABYRINTH_POWER.descrip: Enemies in the Labyrinth cannot act and are unaffected by Attack cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_LABYRINTH_POWER.smartDe: Enemies cannot act and are unaffected by Attack cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_TIME_STOP_POWER.title: Time
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_TIME_STOP_POWER.descrip: You will take an extra turn before enemies act.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_MAGIC_CHARGE_PO: Upon entering 5–9 Magic Charge, the next elemental card played enters its element state. At 10 charge, the next card that can trigger its Extra effect spends 10 charge, triggers Extra, and enters its element state.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_CREATE_POWER.de: After combat victory, obtain additional random relic rewards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_RETURN_POWER.de: When this expires, restore recorded HP and Block, remove new powers, and reset recorded powers still present.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_DREAM_POWER.des: Temporary Sakura cards in combat revert to their original Clow cards at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_DREAM_POWER.sma: Dream conversions revert at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_DARK_POWER.desc: At end of turn, you may Exhaust cards from your hand. If you Exhaust any, gain 1 Energy next turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_DARK_POWER.smar: End of turn: Exhaust up to {Amount}.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_DARK_SAKURA_POW: At end of turn, choose any number of cards in your hand to Exhaust, then add the same number of upgraded random Clow cards to your discard pile.
End of turn: Exhaust chosen cards to generate upgraded Clow cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SHIELD_WARD_POW: At the end of your turn, gain Block.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_JUMP_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, remove random debuffs from yourself.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_JUMP_POWER.smar: Start of turn: remove {Amount} random debuff(s).
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SWEET_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, heal based on missing HP.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SWEET_POWER.sma: Start of turn: heal {Amount}% missing HP.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_VOICE_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, add The Voice to your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_VOICE_POWER.sma: Start of turn: add {Amount} The Voice.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_EARTHY_POWER.de: Whenever you play an [gold]Earthy card[/gold], gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_EARTHY_PERMANEN: At end of turn, [gold]Earthy state[/gold] does not disappear.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FIREY_POWER.des: Whenever you play a [gold]Firey card[/gold], deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FIREY_PERMANENT: At end of turn, [gold]Firey state[/gold] does not disappear.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WATERY_POWER.de: Whenever you play 2 [gold]Watery cards[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WATERY_PERMANEN: At end of turn, [gold]Watery state[/gold] does not disappear.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WINDY_POWER.des: Whenever you play 2 [gold]Windy cards[/gold], draw 1 card.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WINDY_PERMANENT: At end of turn, [gold]Windy state[/gold] does not disappear.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WAVE_POWER.desc: Whenever you play an Attack, gain Block.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_BIG_POWER.title: Big
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LITTLE_POWER.de: Attack damage taken is reduced by 33%.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FLY_POWER.title: Fly
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FLY_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, draw cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_GLOW_POWER.desc: If you have Sealed Book, gain Magic Charge at the start of your turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_GLOW_POWER.smar: Start of turn: gain {Amount} Magic Charge.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_MOVE_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, add Empty Spell to your hand.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_MOVE_POWER.smar: Start of turn: add {Amount} Empty Spell.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LOCK_SAKURA_POW: The next Magic Charge effect you trigger does not spend Magic Charge.
The next {Amount} Magic Charge effect(s) you trigger do not spend Magic Charge.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LOOP_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, draw cards, then discard cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LOOP_POWER.smar: Start of turn: draw {Amount}, discard up to {Amount}.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LOOP_SAKURA_POW: Whenever you discard a card, draw cards.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LIGHT_POWER.des: Your maximum hand size is increased by 2. Void no longer costs Energy when drawn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LIGHT_POWER.sma: Max hand size +2. Void does not cost Energy when drawn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_LIGHT_SAKURA_PO: Status and Curse cards can be played and are Exhausted when played. Whenever you play a Status or Curse card, draw 1 card and heal 1 HP. Void no longer makes you lose Energy when drawn.
Play a Status or Curse: Exhaust it, draw 1, and heal 1 HP. Void no longer costs Energy when drawn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_TWIN_POWER.desc: The next Clow card you play each turn is played twice.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_TWIN_POWER.smar: The next {Amount} Clow card(s) each turn are played twice.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_TWIN_SAKURA_POW: Clow cards cost more this combat and are played additional times.
Clow cards cost {Amount} more and play {Amount} extra time(s).
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FLOAT_POWER.des: Whenever you draw a card, gain Block.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FLOAT_SAKURA_PO: Whenever you gain Block, gain additional Block. Block from every source can trigger this.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FREEZE_POWER.de: Each stack lasts 1 enemy turn. If the enemy intends to attack, it skips its action and gains 5 Block. Remove 1 stack at the end of each enemy turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_FREEZE_POWER.sm: {Amount} enemy turns remaining; attack intents skip their action and gain 5 Block.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SILENT_PENDING_: At the start of your next turn, you cannot play Attack cards that turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SILENT_NO_ATTAC: You cannot play Attack cards this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SLEEP_POWER.des: Skips action. Removed when taking unblocked damage.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_CERBERUS_MARK_P: Each stack makes this creature take 25% more attack damage. Removed at the start of its turn.
Each stack makes this creature take 25% more attack damage.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_NOTHING_POWER.d: Clow and Sakura cards cost 0 and Exhaust. Whenever one is played, gain Block and make ALL enemies lose HP. Unless upgraded, removes a random other deck card after combat.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_NOTHING_POWER.s: Clow/Sakura cards cost 0 and Exhaust. Played Clow/Sakura: gain {Block} Block and ALL enemies lose {Damage} HP. Unless upgraded, remove 1 other deck card after combat.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_HOPE_POWER.desc: All your normal damage and Block are doubled.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_HOPE_POWER.smar: Normal damage and Block are doubled.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_NOTHING_MONSTER: When you play a Clow or Sakura card, it has a chance to Exhaust.
Clow/Sakura cards have a {Chance}% chance to Exhaust when played.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_TEMPORARY_STREN: Attack damage dealt is modified this turn. Removed at end of turn.
Attack damage dealt is reduced this turn. Removed at end of turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WOOD_POWER.desc: At the start of the enemy turn, for each enemy: if it has no [gold]Poison[/gold], apply 3 [gold]Poison[/gold] to it; otherwise, it loses {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_WOOD_POWER.smar: Enemy turn start: enemies without [gold]Poison[/gold] gain 3 [gold]Poison[/gold]; otherwise, they lose {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_CLASSIC_SAKURA_WOOD_POW: At the start of the enemy turn, all enemies gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold] and lose {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Enemy turn start: all enemies gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold] and lose {Amount} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_ANOTHER_ME_POWER.title: Another Me
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_ANOTHER_ME_POWER.descri: Whenever Magic Charge is spent to activate an Extra effect, refund {Amount} Magic Charge.
SAKURA_MOD_POWER_ANOTHER_ME_POWER.smartD: Paid Extra effects refund {Amount} Magic Charge.
